# Copilot Instructions

Use `AGENTS.md` as the repository's canonical agent guide.

Before editing, read the active Completion Unit and state files in `docs/`, then inspect the repository. Preserve `source/resume-content.md` exactly unless Keanan approves a specific content change.

Work only on the single approved Completion Unit. Use semantic HTML, modern CSS, and minimal vanilla JavaScript. Do not introduce a framework, build system, external service, tracking, generated imagery, or public release of private client material.
